questions.title: Taiwan’s Indigenous Languages
questions.question:
Taiwan is home to 16 officially recognized indigenous groups. But did you know that their languages belong to a single language family that stretches all the way from Taiwan to the Philippines, Hawaii, New Zealand, and even Madagascar?
Which language family do Taiwan’s indigenous languages belong to?
